description: Style NoteCrafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory.Product DetailsLeatherette upper with a gold textured design One main compartment with a zipped pocket and an organiser sleeveTwo short plastic handles with a metallic designZipped pocket on the backMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 15 cmWidth: 32 cmDepth: 10 cm
